tools.name: bets.cashin
tools.description: Allows a trusted application to cash in a bet (take a return on a bet) on behalf of the customer. If the customers monitor bets they can cash in a bet at any point before the event ends.

tools.name: bets.getBetHistory
tools.description: Retrieves the customer’s bet history. Options are available to organise the history in terms of date, bet type and settled and unsettled bets. The maximum number of bets and bet history pages retrieved can also be set.

tools.name: bets.getFreeBets
tools.description: Retrieves the current free bets available for a customer.

tools.name: bets.placeComplexBet
tools.description: Places a multiple or a complex bet.

tools.name: bets.placeSingleBet
tools.description: Places a single bet. When placing a single bet using live inplay bets, the system might generate a bet delay to allow a time margin to negate the effects of major changes (for example, goals) to the market. Note that the amount of bet delay will vary by category and event type. A delayedBetId will be recieved that can be used to resubmit the bet.

tools.name: bets.validateBetslip
tools.description: Organises the betslip when one or more selections are made. It returns a bet slip structure organised by betting opportunities.

tools.name: openapi.previewSpec
tools.description: Preview an OpenAPI document before adding it as a source

tools.name: openapi.addSource
tools.description: Add an OpenAPI source and register its operations as tools
